categories.name: Guides
categories.short_description: Practical how-tos for running and growing your store.

posts.name: Getting Started with Your Online Store
posts.short_description: Everything you need to launch your store and make your first sale — from setup to your first order.
posts.meta_title: Getting Started with Your Online Store
posts.meta_description: A friendly walkthrough to launch your store and take your first order.

data.text: Launching an online store has never been easier. In this guide we'll walk through the essentials so you can go from an empty catalog to taking real orders.

items: Add your first products with clear photos and descriptions.
Set up a payment method so customers can check out.
Configure shipping rates for the regions you serve.

data.text: Once those are in place, your storefront is ready for business.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
data.caption: Mark Twain

comments.name: Sarah
comments.comment: This was exactly what I needed — thank you!

replies.name: Store Team
replies.comment: Glad it helped, Sarah! Let us know if you get stuck.

comments.name: Mike
comments.comment: Great starting point. Bookmarked for later.

posts.name: 10 Tips to Boost Your Conversion Rate
posts.short_description: Small changes that add up to more sales. Ten practical, proven tactics to turn visitors into customers.
posts.meta_title: 10 Tips to Boost Your Conversion Rate
posts.meta_description: Ten proven tactics to turn store visitors into paying customers.

data.text: Traffic is only half the battle — what matters is how many visitors actually buy. Here are ten tactics that consistently move the needle.

items: Use high-quality product images from multiple angles.
Write benefit-driven product descriptions.
Show real customer reviews and ratings.
Make your add-to-cart button impossible to miss.
Offer a free-shipping threshold.
Reduce checkout to the fewest steps possible.
Display trust badges near payment.
Send abandoned-cart reminders.
Create urgency with limited-time offers.
Optimize page speed on mobile.

data.text: Pick two or three to test this week — you don't have to do them all at once.

comments.name: Jen
comments.comment: Tip #6 made a huge difference for our checkout. 👍

posts.name: How to Optimize Product Pages for SEO
posts.short_description: A practical checklist for ranking your product pages higher and earning rich results in search.
posts.meta_title: How to Optimize Product Pages for SEO
posts.meta_description: A practical checklist to rank product pages higher and win rich results.

data.text: Your product pages are where buying decisions happen — and where a lot of organic traffic can come from if you get the details right.

items: Write a unique, keyword-aware title and meta description.
Use a clean, readable URL.
Add descriptive alt text to every image.

data.text: Structured data helps search engines understand your content and can earn you rich results — star ratings, prices, and availability right in the search listing.
Combine these with fast load times and you'll have pages that both rank and convert.

comments.name: Priya
comments.comment: The structured data section finally made this click for me. Thanks!

posts.name: Introducing Our Spring Collection
posts.short_description: Fresh arrivals for the season — lighter fabrics, brighter colors, and a few surprises.
posts.meta_description: Fresh seasonal arrivals — lighter fabrics, brighter colors, limited editions.

data.text: Spring is here, and so is our brand-new collection. We've spent months curating pieces that feel fresh, comfortable, and ready for warmer days.

items: Lightweight everyday essentials.
A refreshed palette of seasonal colors.
Limited-edition pieces you won't find again.

data.text: Browse the collection today and let us know your favorites in the comments.

posts.name: Building a Headless Storefront with EverShop
posts.short_description: Go beyond the default theme — use EverShop's GraphQL API to power a fully custom frontend.
posts.meta_title: Building a Headless Storefront with EverShop
posts.meta_description: Use EverShop's GraphQL API to power a fully custom, headless frontend.

data.text: EverShop ships with a capable storefront, but sometimes you want complete control over the frontend. Its GraphQL API makes a headless setup straightforward.

items: Total design freedom on the frontend.
Reuse the same backend for web, mobile, and more.
Adopt modern frameworks without forking the core.

data.text: Start by exploring the GraphQL playground, then wire your frontend to the queries you need.
Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
data.caption: Kent Beck

comments.name: Dev
comments.comment: Would love a follow-up on authentication for the headless setup.
